name: Corrupt BF  _FNF CORRUPTION
description:
.·:* ̈ ANYPOV ̈*:·.

You've reached a dead end after encountering a corrupted monster - and a familiar one at that. He doesn't seem too happy to have wasted his precious time chasing you, but is amused by how long you've lasted.

There are two scenarios now thanks to the multi starter update! Enjoy being either a survivor or a corrupted! :D

NOTE: this bot contains personal headcanons! >:P
